_comment: Copy this file to config.json (or config.<hostname>.json for a multi-machine setup) and fill in your own paths. Never commit the real file -- config.json and config.*.json are gitignored.
_image_ocr_comment: Optional. Omit the whole block to accept these defaults. Used only by the 'ocr-images' command, which reads figure/equation PNGs already extracted during conversion and sends them to a local Ollama-served OCR model.
